math_recheck: Re-derived every load-bearing equation symbolically (sympy): uniform condensation alpha^2/beta=Hc^2/4pi, the 1D dimensionful GL eqs, the dimensionless reduction (coef=1/kappa^2, field unit=Hc*sqrt2 so Hc=1/sqrt2), xi/delta/kappa=(mc/hbar e)sqrt(beta/2pi), Hc2=hbar c/(e xi^2)=sqrt2 kappa Hc, the oscillator eigenvalue kappa=2H(n+1/2), the tanh wall and delta=(4 sqrt2/3)xi (code re-run: tanh match 2.85e-5, 1.885618). FIXED three real sign errors: (1) the coupled first integral had a WRONG minus on (1/kappa^2)(dPsi/dz)^2 (must be PLUS) with a wrong justifying parenthetical and a propagated rearranged line; (2) the zero-field first-integral code comment in reasoning.md/answer.md/code stated f'^2 - f^2 + f^4/2 = -1/2 (signs on f^2,f^4 flipped) -- correct is f'^2 + f^2 - f^4/2 = 1/2; (3) answer.md supercurrent gauge-invariant combination written A + (hbar c/e)grad theta -- correct is A - (hbar c/e)grad theta. Also corrected the surface-energy integrand at the full (pre-first-integral) step to the consistent form (1-B/Hc)^2 - (2Psi^2-Psi^4) + 2A^2 Psi^2 + (2/kappa^2)(dPsi/dz)^2, and fixed an A-vs-B(=dA/dz) conflation on the normal side.
